import requests
import httpx
import time

httpx.set_default_timeout(5)

try:
    response = httpx.get("https://httpbin.org/get")
    response.raise_for_status()
    print(response.text)
    sys.exit(0)

except Exception as e:

    response.raise_for_status()
    print(response.text)
    sys.exit(0)
except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
    print(f"Request failed: {e}")
    sys.exit(1)

sys.exit(0)
